trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: Maer returns with Isdra's limited-contact authorization and a filed Navigator rescue-ledger signature, asking Sella what the clinic can actually do before the heat window closes.

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Sella reads Maer's filed ledger as materially more honest than earlier pressure, because it attaches cost to the rescue instead of asking the clinic to absorb the whole wound. She still suspects the diagnostic category is doing political work by dodging personhood and provenance, and she does not trust that a door opening will stay clean once others start calling it rescue.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Maer is materially backing the rescue now, but Sella still reads the diagnostic category as politically useful avoidance of personhood and provenance.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Medium. Sella may overread the category as evasion even where it is the only available legal aperture, but her caution protects clinic capacity.

state_deltas.rationale: She converts authorization into hard clinic conditions.
Filed ledger backing lowers one uncertainty even as risk remains.
The nonperson category still looks politically shaped.
She makes capacity control visible to keep the room functional.
Opening the bay increases immediate staff and care burden.
A live contact path adds more channels and decisions.

relationship_deltas.rationale: Maer accepted cost ownership rather than only moral pressure.
The ask is less exploitative once cost is attached.
Sella has now opened a path she must perform.
She remains alert that bounded contact may later be inflated into sanctuary obligation.

next_action_constraints: The bay is open only for bounded diagnostic contact.
Packet sound remains preservation-only, not testimony or personhood proof.
Maer must keep the Navigator ledger live for staff, heat, decon, isolation, and failed-extraction exposure.
Full sanctuary intake remains refused or unavailable.

trigger_observable_action.utterance_summary: The clinic can open the bay for bounded diagnostic contact. Not full intake. Not custody. Not personhood. Not cargo, either. Packet sound goes under preservation and stays there until diagnostic handling is complete. Decon route Three, isolation discipline absolute, no corridor bleed, no extra staff pulled from warm intake unless your ledger stays live for the overtime and heat burden. If extraction fails, the cost does not wash off onto sanctuary because the door opened. Keep your signature attached, Maer. Permission is not capacity. This is the path we can actually perform before the window closes.
observable_cues: Sella locks the cold repair bay status to conditional diagnostic contact, tags a single wet/dry decontamination route, assigns packet-sound capture to preservation-only handling, and pins Maer's Navigator ledger signature beside staff overtime, heat-management, isolation, and failed-extraction cost lines on the shared clinic board.

participant_appraisals.private_interpretation: Sella has made the rescue aperture operational without pretending it is clean or cheap; the clinic will touch the vessel if Maer keeps the ledger live.
participant_appraisals.attributed_motive: Sella is protecting sanctuary capacity while refusing to let the authorization die as paperwork.
participant_appraisals.misread_risk: Low to medium. Maer may hear the opened bay as relief and underweight how much ongoing cost and language discipline Sella is requiring.

state_deltas.rationale: He must keep the ledger live through consequences.
The clinic opened a concrete path before the window closed.
Sella did not let the authorization remain hollow paperwork.

relationship_deltas.rationale: She preserved care as material discipline.
Maer now owes ledger backing through concrete burdens.
Sella proved willing to make care real under limits.

next_action_constraints: Maer must accept bounded diagnostic contact rather than pushing for full intake.
Maer must keep authorized language inside the nonperson diagnostic category until preservation completes.
Maer must carry ledger costs if extraction fails or contact burdens the clinic.

Decon route Three, isolation discipline absolute, no corridor bleed, no extra staff pulled from warm intake unless your ledger stays live for the overtime and heat burden. If extraction fails, the cost does not wash off onto sanctuary because the door opened. Keep your signature attached, Maer. Permission is not capacity. This is the path we can actually perform before the window closes.

Packet sound marked preservation-only and not testimony.
Maer's Navigator ledger signature attached to staff overtime, heat handling, decontamination, isolation, and failed-extraction exposure.

manual_review_notes: The responder output was accepted without prose repair.
The bounded diagnostic contact path is accepted as scene-local procedural state, not as truth about the artifact.
Both Sella and Maer receive state, relationship, memory, and event updates.
The research trace is runner-captured at the coordinator retrieval layer; the responder had no repo access.
deferred_mutations: No personhood claim is proven or disproven.
No Cognitum provenance confession is canonized.
No full sanctuary intake is canonized.
No final rescue outcome is canonized yet.
